name: Baby Unicorn with Stars
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a tiny chubby baby unicorn sitting down with a small curly mane and a short spiral horn, big sparkly eyes and a fluffy tufted tail, surrounded by floating five-point stars and a couple of little hearts

name: Rainbow Unicorn
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a graceful unicorn prancing with one hoof raised, a long flowing mane and tail made of rainbow-striped curls, a spiral horn, and a big arching rainbow behind it with a couple of rounded clouds

name: Unicorn Castle
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a magical unicorn standing in front of a tall fairytale castle with pointed towers, a flowing mane and a spiral horn, stars and a crescent moon in the sky, and a path lined with flowers leading to the castle gate

name: Unicorn in the Clouds
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a dreamy unicorn resting on top of a big fluffy cloud, a long wavy mane and spiral horn, hooves tucked underneath, with smaller puffy clouds, a few floating stars, and a crescent moon nearby in the sky

name: Unicorn Princess
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: an elegant unicorn wearing a small pointed crown tilted on its head, a long braided mane decorated with little flowers and beads, a spiral horn, a flowing decorative tail, and a draped saddle blanket with a heart pattern

name: Chibi Unicorn
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: an adorable chibi unicorn with an oversized round head, huge sparkly eyes, tiny stubby legs, a short curly mane, and a little spiral horn, sitting happily with a small heart above it, very simple bold shapes

name: Unicorn with Flowers
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a gentle unicorn standing in a flower meadow with a crown of daisies and roses around its horn, lowering its head to sniff a tall blossom, a soft flowing mane, with scattered flowers and leafy grass around its hooves

name: Flying Unicorn
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a winged unicorn soaring through the sky with large feathered wings spread wide, front legs reaching forward and a long streaming mane and tail, a spiral horn, with a few clouds and twinkling stars around it

name: Sleeping Unicorn
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a peaceful unicorn curled up asleep with its legs tucked in and eyes gently closed, a long mane draped softly over its body, a spiral horn, resting on a patch of grass under a crescent moon with a few stars and tiny Zs floating above

name: Unicorn and Bunny Friend
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a friendly unicorn standing beside a small fluffy bunny, the unicorn lowering its head to greet the rabbit, both with happy expressions, a flowing mane and spiral horn, with a couple of flowers and a butterfly nearby

name: Winter Unicorn
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a graceful unicorn standing in a snowy scene wearing a knitted scarf around its neck, a frosty mane with snowflake details, a spiral horn, falling snowflakes around it, and a small bare tree and a snowman in the background

name: Unicorn Portrait
subject: fantasy/unicorn
prompt: a close-up head-and-shoulders portrait of a unicorn facing forward, large gentle eyes with long lashes, a detailed spiral horn between the ears, a richly flowing mane framing the face, and a few small stars and flowers around the edges
